description: Leasing penetration for registered passenger cars: total leased count, fleet share, and within-fuel EV/petrol/diesel leasing rates. Use for lease count/share or fuel-type leasing. Leased = LeasingGyldigFra is set. For 'how common is leasing among electric/petrol/diesel' use electric_leasing_pct / petrol_leasing_pct / diesel_leasing_pct (share of that fuel type leased). For share of total fleet use leased_share_of_fleet_pct.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), leased_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL, total_electric = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", leased_electric = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El", total_petrol = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Benzin", leased_petrol = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer == "Benzin", total_diesel = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel", leased_diesel = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel" | EVAL leased_share_of_fleet_pct = ROUND(leased_cars * 100.0 / total_cars, 1), electric_leasing_pct = ROUND(leased_electric * 100.0 / total_electric, 1), petrol_leasing_pct = ROUND(leased_petrol * 100.0 / total_petrol, 1), diesel_leasing_pct = ROUND(leased_diesel * 100.0 / total_diesel, 1), electric_leased_share_of_fleet_pct = ROUND(leased_electric * 100.0 / total_cars, 1), petrol_leased_share_of_fleet_pct = ROUND(leased_petrol * 100.0 / total_cars, 1), diesel_leased_share_of_fleet_pct = ROUND(leased_diesel * 100.0 / total_cars, 1) | LIMIT 1
